summary: Keep Workbench Liepin source-run state aligned when passive OpenCLI recovery follows a scoped runtime start.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is the red-zone persistence boundary for source-run and runtime job state. This change preserves explicit start/retry behavior while preventing passive session refresh from requeueing a Liepin run that was already excluded from the active runtime job.
verification: uv run --group dev ruff check src tests experiments tools
